subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Dawning-Place of the signs of his Lord, the All-Merciful, the Bountiful, and hath hearkened to the Call when it was raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی مشرق آیات ربه المشفق الکریم و سمع الندآء اذ ارتفع
